posts.title: [ADC] [DEV] Tarballs hold broken install.sh and invterm.sh
posts.body:
The official ADC 1.4.5 holds broken install.sh and invterm.sh on some 
desktops, Im aware and fixing this issue, expect a fix in between now 
and tomorrow night.

-- 
Nathan du Buy
Open Source Developer

posts.title: [ADC] [DEV] Aurora will get newer code base
posts.body:
[DEV] ADC Aurora will get a newer code base, The current canary 
<https://gitlab.com/Mealman1551/adc-canary> code works well which means 
i will port it to the Aurora (Unstable) branch, expect new code coming 
days to the Aurora branch 
<https://github.com/Mealman1551/ArchivedDataCodec/tree/ADC-Unstable>.

~Mealman1551

-- 
Nathan du Buy
Open Source Developer

*OpenPGP fingerprint*
|02D7 2154 D625 B937 CCA7 4FD2 3133 1ED9 0BDC 8954|

posts.title: [ADC] [DEV] [DISCUSS] New Makefile
posts.body:
Hello,

Ive been looking into a simpler and more streamlined experience for the 
Makefile, this includes removing some pointing variables and adding a 
new fix that will make the |invterm.sh |available for almost every 
default terminal.

Expect the new Makefile in the upcoming release source code. (No dates 
available as of writing this mail).

posts.title: [ADC] Re: [DEV] [DISCUSS] New Makefile
posts.body:
Still testing in different branch, will merge after it works.

Op 25-4-2026 om 15:58 schreef Nathan du Buy:
>
> Hello,
>
> Ive been looking into a simpler and more streamlined experience for 
> the Makefile, this includes removing some pointing variables and 
> adding a new fix that will make the |invterm.sh |available for almost 
> every default terminal.
>
> Expect the new Makefile in the upcoming release source code. (No dates 
> available as of writing this mail).
